title: Phantom Chemicalfaces
description: Adds Phantomfaces from Actually Additions for Mekanism gases/chemicals
body:
This is a small addon to Actually Additions and Mekanism that adds a Phantom Chemicalface for Mekanism chemicals/gases, which weren't able to be handled directly with the usual Actually Additions phantomfaces.

Default recipe (2 infused alloy + 1 phantom itemface):

![Recipe for Phantom Chemicalfaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42afe22231931a409c4ae60679622eb953bd104d.png)
